episodes.title: The Psychology Behind Carbon Nation | Therapist Reacts to The Cult of NatureBoy
episodes.description:
In this insightful discussion, we explore the intricate dynamics at play within the 'natureboy' phenomenon and the group known as 'carbon nation.' We examine the psychological aspects that contribute to 'cult life' and the lasting impact of 'trauma' on individuals involved. Understanding these elements is crucial for addressing 'mental health' challenges associated with such experiences. #natureboy #eligiobishop  #documentary #psychology #cult
